hero.sub: Your Life In The Heart Of Nature
hero.desc: Born from a bold vision — to transform the way we live by reuniting people with the land. Agricultural compounds that merge modern homes with fertile farmland.

about.title: About
about.desc: La Granja is a development company redefining the way people live by creating agricultural compounds that unite modern homes with fertile farmland. We offer families a lifestyle that is healthier, more balanced, and closer to nature — without giving up the comfort and convenience of city life.
about.b1: Each La Granja community is designed around a simple idea: a home that gives back. Residents enjoy contemporary villas while benefiting from productive land that can generate income.
about.b2: Our compounds offer a lifestyle as sustainable as it is rewarding — where every home is surrounded by fertile farmland.
about.b3: We are lifestyle creators, offering spaces where people can live better today while building value for the future.
about.b4: La Granja was born to turn a vision into reality — agriculture, sustainability, and modern life together, just an hour from the city.

vm.title: Vision
vm.visionText: To inspire a lifestyle movement where every home is more than just a shelter — it is a source of wellness, sustainability, and value. We envision vibrant communities surrounded by fertile soil, where every home offers comfort, every acre holds potential, and every investment grows.
vm.missionText: We create communities that reconnect people with nature, foster sustainable practices, and provide spaces where life and investment grow hand in hand. Our agricultural compounds allow families to live surrounded by nature and breathe freely — all while knowing their home and land remain valuable, long-term assets.

story.title: Our
story.p1: It all started with a simple dream: to create a life where modern living meets nature, where comfort and sustainability go hand in hand.
story.p2: The founders of La Granja saw the need for a place that blends the peace of the countryside with the convenience of being close to the city.
story.p3: They envisioned vibrant communities surrounded by fertile soil, where every home offers comfort, every acre holds potential, and every investment grows.
story.p4: La Granja was born to turn this vision into reality: a lifestyle where agriculture, sustainability, and modern life come together — just an hour away from the city.

values.title: Our Core
values.v1text: Life is richer when shared. Our developments foster strong connections between neighbors where families can grow together, share experiences, and create a culture of belonging.
values.v2text: We are guided by honesty, transparency, and trust. Every project we deliver reflects our commitment to doing the right thing for our residents, our partners, and our environment.
values.v3text: We believe in living in harmony with the earth. Every La Granja community is designed with eco-friendly practices that protect natural resources and ensure a lifestyle future generations can enjoy.
values.v4text: We measure success not only by financial growth, but by the quality of life our communities bring. At La Granja, prosperity means a lifestyle that is rewarding, meaningful, and naturally abundant.
values.v5text: True wealth begins with well-being. Our compounds nurture healthier lifestyles — from fresh air and natural produce to open spaces that promote physical and emotional balance for families.
values.v6text: We embrace new ideas that blend technology, design, and agriculture to create smarter, more efficient communities. Innovation at La Granja means reimagining modern living while staying connected to the land.

villa.p1: At La Granja, we believe that a home should be more than walls and a roof — it should be a source of wellness, purpose, and prosperity. That belief gave birth to our unique concept: agricultural compounds that merge modern living with productive farmland.
villa.p2: Each La Granja development offers residents a contemporary villa designed for comfort and elegance, paired with fertile land that can be cultivated for fresh produce or managed for profit.
villa.p3: This blend creates a lifestyle that is both rewarding and sustainable — where families can enjoy the peace of nature, the benefits of farm-to-table living, and the financial value of land ownership.
villa.f1text: Without sacrificing modern conveniences — the best of both worlds in one community.
villa.f2text: Through open spaces, fresh air, and access to natural produce grown on your own land.
villa.f3text: Eco-friendly design combined with productive land for a future-proof lifestyle investment.
villa.f4text: A home that can generate income and offer long-term stability — your land, your legacy.

management.title: Management
management.desc: The visionary founders behind La Granja — united by expertise in construction and agriculture to create Egypt's most distinguished lifestyle compounds.

ahmed.name: Ahmed Galal
ahmed.p1: Experienced architecture engineer and founder of El Fath Construction Company, established in 2008.
ahmed.p2: Played a pivotal role in the construction of the 2022 FIFA World Cup Stadiums in Qatar.
ahmed.p3: Actively involved in major state projects since 2008, including the high-speed train project in Suez.
ahmed.p4: His vision and leadership shaped La Granja's integration of modern infrastructure with sustainable living.

mohamed.name: Mohamed Ragab
mohamed.p1: Agricultural developer and owner of Elite for Agricultural Development.
mohamed.p2: Working in agricultural investment and development since 2020, focusing on sustainable solutions.
mohamed.p3: Significant projects include El Alamein, New Valley, and the West Assiut project.
mohamed.p4: His agricultural expertise integrates modern living with fertile land for a sustainable, prosperous future.

investment.title: Investment
investment.i1text: La Granja redefines investment by merging financial prosperity with environmental integrity. Each element is crafted for enduring value.
investment.i2text: Profit with Purpose. Eco-efficient infrastructure reduces operational costs and enhances long-term returns.
investment.i3text: Every aspect of La Granja's environment contributes to its ecological desirability and market value.
investment.i4text: Strategically positioned for expansion, La Granja offers both convenience and exclusivity.
investment.i5text: La Granja is more than an investment — it is a statement of enduring purpose and timeless prestige.
investment.i6text: The greatest return comes from the life you live. True wealth is measured in health, balance, and well-being.

projects.title: Our
projects.desc: Three distinctive projects, one unwavering vision — communities where modern living and sustainable agriculture exist side by side.

rw.label: Project 01
rw.tagline: Create Your Farm — Fayoum Asyut Road
rw.desc: Rayan West is not just another agricultural project — it stands out as a one-of-a-kind investment that goes beyond offering a simple villa or a piece of land.
rw.f1text: A complete lifestyle experience combining contemporary residential comfort with fertile farmland, ensuring steady income for residents.
rw.f2text: Situated along the Fayoum Asyut Road, only an hour's drive from Cairo — the perfect balance of tranquility and city access.
rw.f3text: Villas built in Andalusian-inspired design with natural ventilation domes ensuring cool, fresh interiors throughout the year.
rw.f4text: Productive greenhouses · 30 Barhi palm trees · Land ready for intercropping.

rh.label: Project 02
rh.title: Rayan Hills
rh.subtitle: A new horizon for life & investment
rh.text: Rayan Hills will embrace the same philosophy that defines La Granja — combining elegant modern villas, fertile land, and a lifestyle rooted in nature. It represents the continuation of our mission to redefine how people live, invest, and connect with the land.

gh.label: Project 03
gh.title: Ghernata
gh.subtitle: A new horizon for life & investment
gh.text: Ghernata will carry forward the La Granja vision — sophisticated architecture, productive agricultural land, and a community lifestyle that is both rewarding and sustainable. This is only the beginning.

egypt.title: Egypt's Agricultural
egypt.intro: Egypt is shaping a new agricultural era — and La Granja is at the heart of it.
egypt.p1: Egypt is investing heavily in agriculture to secure food supply and boost exports. The FY 2025/2026 plan allocates EGP 17.5 billion to modernize farming, increase productivity and expand greenhouses.
egypt.p2: The strategy includes reclaiming land to reach 12 million feddans by 2030, using smart irrigation, high-yield crops, and major reclamation projects like Toshka, the New Delta, and Sinai.
egypt.p3: Egypt's Vision 2030 further emphasizes technology-driven, sustainable farming through AI, modern irrigation, and climate-adaptive practices.
egypt.col2title: La Granja: Investing in Egypt's Agricultural Tomorrow
egypt.p4: As Egypt embraces a modern, sustainable agricultural future, La Granja stands at the forefront, combining contemporary living with productive farmland. Every home is part of a living ecosystem where comfort, nature, and effortless income coexist.
egypt.p5: Just outside Cairo, La Granja offers rural tranquility with city accessibility, while certified green contracts ensure secure, long-term investment — making it a model for Egypt's next generation of agriculture.

choosing.title: Choosing an
choosing.desc: La Granja creates communities for people who want more than four walls — a life that is vibrant, sustainable, and rewarding.
choosing.desc2: By choosing an agricultural compound, you are not just buying property — you are investing in a way of life.
choosing.c1desc: A life rooted in nature yet supported by modern design and amenities.
choosing.c2desc: Fresh air, open landscapes, and a direct connection to nature every single day.
choosing.c3desc: Sustainable communities where children can grow closer to the land.
choosing.c4desc: Eco-friendly practices and farmland that give back to both you and the environment.
choosing.c5desc: Beyond lifestyle, your land is a long-term asset able to generate income and hold future value.

sustainability.title: Sustainability as a
sustainability.p1: At La Granja, sustainability is not an option — it is the foundation of how we live and build. We believe that caring for the environment and caring for ourselves are one and the same.
sustainability.p2: From eco-friendly infrastructure to fertile land that produces natural food, sustainability is woven into daily life. Residents breathe cleaner air, eat fresher produce, and enjoy spaces designed to reduce stress and promote well-being.
sustainability.f1text: Every structure is built with green principles, minimizing environmental impact.
sustainability.f2text: Fertile land that produces natural, fresh food and connects residents to the earth.
sustainability.f3text: Modern water management systems that conserve resources and optimize productivity.
sustainability.f4text: Designed to help families live closer to nature and conserve resources for future generations.

partners.title: Our
partners.desc: La Granja is proud to work alongside Egypt's leading organizations in agriculture and construction.

sg.t1: La Granja is proud to partner with Sun Gate, one of Egypt's leading names in food production, trading, and export. With over 17 years of expertise, Sun Gate has built a strong reputation for delivering premium food products to local and international markets.
sg.t2: To become the leading and preferred export with quality, service, and values as the highest priorities — satisfying the needs of customers, employees, and stakeholders.
sg.t3: La Granja supplies Sun Gate with fresh, high-quality crops. Sun Gate then processes, packages, and distributes these products across local and global markets — ensuring a seamless supply chain from farm to final product.

ef.t1: La Granja is proud to partner with El Fath Construction Company, one of Egypt's leading companies in the construction industry. Founded in 2008, El Fath has been a prominent player for over a decade.
ef.t2: El Fath has worked on significant state projects, including the high-speed train project in Suez and numerous government initiatives. Their commitment to excellence makes them a trusted partner.
ef.t3: El Fath's construction expertise ensures that every La Granja development meets the highest standards of quality, durability, and architectural integrity.

footer.tagline: Your Life In The Heart Of Nature
footer.about: Creating agricultural communities that reunite people with the land — where modern living and sustainable farming exist in perfect harmony.
